parameters.query:
SELECT
  ps.url,
  ps.title,
  TRIM(split_part(split_part(split_part(
    coalesce(ps.title, replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-',' ')),
    ' купить', 1), ' |', 1), ' —', 1)) as brand,
  CASE
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys'    THEN 'Game Keys'
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card'    THEN 'Gift Card'
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-accounts'     THEN 'Accounts'
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency'     THEN 'Currency'
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription' THEN 'Subscription'
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-software'     THEN 'Software'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as category,
  coalesce(p.min_price::text, '') as min_price,
  coalesce(p.max_price::text, '') as max_price,
  coalesce(p.sku_count::text, '0') as sku_count,
  coalesce(p.original_name, '') as original_name
FROM page_seo ps
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    MIN(p2.price) as min_price,
    MAX(p2.price) as max_price,
    COUNT(*) as sku_count,
    MIN(p2.original_name) as original_name
  FROM products p2
  WHERE p2.is_active = true
    AND lower(replace(p2.brand,' ','-')) =
        CASE
          WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys'    THEN replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-game-keys','')
          WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card'    THEN replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-gift-card','')
          WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-accounts'     THEN replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-accounts','')
          WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency'     THEN replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-currency','')
          WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-subscription' THEN replace(replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/',''),'-subscription','')
          ELSE replace(ps.url,'https://gaming-goods.ru/t/','')
        END
) p ON true
WHERE ps.lang = 'ru'
  AND ps.url LIKE '%/t/%'
  AND length(coalesce(ps.title,'')) > 0
  AND (ps.description IS NULL OR length(ps.description) = 0)
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-gift-card' THEN 1
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-currency'  THEN 2
    WHEN ps.url LIKE '%-game-keys' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  ps.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 890
